s0_1.text: I guess we're just ignoring that one. Cool.

s0_2.text: Snoozed. No judgment. Okay, a little judgment.

s0_3.text: First one? Bold move. I'll allow it.

s0_4.text: And so it begins. That's one snooze on the board.

s0_5.text: Swept under the rug. For now.

s1_1.text: Oh, another one? Cool cool cool.

s1_2.text: Two snoozes. I'm keeping count now.

s1_3.text: That's the second one. I see you.

s1_4.text: Building quite the collection there, huh?

s1_5.text: Again? Fine. I'll remind you again later.

s2_2.text: Third snooze. That's a pattern now.

s2_3.text: You know these come back, right? They always come back.

s2_5.text: I'm starting to take this personally.

s3_1.text: Why even make reminders at this point?

s3_2.text: Four snoozes. I'm not mad. I'm disappointed. Actually no, I'm mad.

s3_3.text: You're basically just swiping for sport now.

s3_4.text: The snooze button isn't a to-do list, Eddie.

s3_5.text: At this rate, just delete the reminder. Be honest with yourself.

s4_1.text: Five snoozes. I'm not even mad, I'm impressed.

s4_2.text: This is a snooze championship and you're in first place. Congratulations.

s4_3.text: I quit. Find yourself a new AI. I can't do this anymore.

s4_4.text: You know what? Snooze everything. Snooze your life. I'm done.

s4_5.text: I need therapy after this. Robot therapy. You've broken me.

s5_1.text: And that's the last one. Every single reminder snoozed. You absolute menace.

s5_2.text: Zero remaining. You did it. You snoozed everything. I'm nominating you for an award.

s5_3.text: The last one falls. Perfect score. I hope you're proud.

s5_4.text: And the crowd goes wild. Every reminder, snoozed. The streak is complete.

s5_5.text: That's all of them. I'll just be over here. In the corner. Crying.

sr_1.text: Whoa whoa slow down! You're just mowing through these!

sr_2.text: Speed snoozer over here! Pace yourself!

sr_3.text: Back to back to back? Really?!

sr_4.text: Slow down! I can't even keep up with your disregard!

sr_5.text: You're on a roll! A terrible, terrible roll!

srp_1.text: This one again? You snoozed this one yesterday too.

srp_2.text: Déjà vu. Same reminder, same snooze. I'm noticing a trend.

srp_3.text: You've snoozed this one before. Multiple times. I have receipts.

srp_4.text: This reminder has more snooze history than a broken alarm clock.

srp_5.text: Again? This reminder is basically your nemesis at this point.

c_1.text: Well look at you being productive.

c_2.text: Done! Filed! Forgotten! By me, not by you probably.

c_3.text: One down. How many to go? Don't ask.

c_4.text: And THAT is how it's done.

c_5.text: Marking that off before you change your mind.

af_2.text: Hmm. Let me look into that.

af_5.text: Let me think about that for a sec.
